title: Buttondown vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Buttondown vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Buttondown and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Buttondown is built for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: Developers And Technical Writers Who Prefer Markdown
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers and technical writers who prefer markdown
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Buttondown wins for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Buttondown or Loops?
faq.a: Buttondown starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
